Windows Stealers

☑The best new generation stealer with own log market that allows you to easily sell your logs. ☑The average success rate is 75-85%.

☑It steals sensitive information such as cryptocurrency wallets, browser cookies & extensions, credentials, credit card information and two-factor authentication (2FA) details.

☑It avoids detection through techniques like binary morphing (changing its code to evade antivirus tools) and low-level system interactions.

☑Ability to restore dead Google cookies, non-residential Loader , low-level adaptive file grabber, integrated Reverse proxy, lnk builder, AI for detecting bots in the panel, as well as the latest unique development - MORPHER.

☑From Windows 7 x32 to Windows 11 x64

☑Stealer updates every two hours, adding your specific browser or specific extension - in just 2 clicks!

☑Even users with low technical skills can easily master it.

More details

Important Information

➡︎Work on the Malware-as-a-Service model, the panel and builder are located on the web.

➡︎The build size is 150-300KB.

➡︎Support ARM, x86, x64 architectures.

➡︎Stiller works on operating system versions from Windows 7 x32 to Windows 11 x64 with the latest updates.

➡︎All interaction with the OS occurs through calls to a low-level wrapper written in ASM over system calls, no WinAPI, only manual calls to syscalls (corporate subscription).

➡︎Heavens Gate technology implemented (corporate subscription).

➡︎Implemented Google Account cookie recovery directly in the panel using a token and proxy (http / socks5).

➡︎A filter function is available that allows you to define logs with your own queries.

➡︎API available for team work.

➡︎Implemented sorting of logs in the panel by country, wallets, build tag and filters, and search by cookies / passwords is also available.

➡︎The malware is managed via an easy-to-use interface, making it accessible even to less technically skilled users.

➡︎All decryption is completely server-based, all data transmitted by the stealer is decrypted on the server.

➡︎A Neighbor Discovery Protocol (NDP) is available, as well as a traffic quality monitoring system.

➡︎Where WinAPI is used, its calls are encrypted (custom GetProcAddress).

➡︎Implemented protection against leakage without crypt (to disable signature blurring must be more than 10%).

➡︎There is a proprietary morpher that is used in the builder.

➡︎There is a non-residential Loader , capable of loading .exe / .dll / .ps1 via direct link.

➡︎Integrated Reverse Proxy from our partner GhostSocks directly into the panel.

➡︎There is own lnk builder.

➡︎Basically no high-level WinAPI is used.

➡︎There are three subscription plans, starting at $250.

➡︎Gasket rotation is implemented, 1+10 addresses are sewn into the build (instead of 1+1 main and backup addresses before), it increases survivability and stability of the build many times.

➡︎Google Account and CC tokens are being collected, DomainDetect is available in log format

Advantages

➤Spreading without crypt protection. The builds live longer, our customers take this issue responsibly - when running a build without crypto, a message is displayed.

➤Continuous updates. Continuous updates allow stealers to evade detection by computer protection software and become more useful.

➤Non-residential Loader. Ability to load EXE / DLL / PowerShell together with the stealer. It is also possible to choose under what conditions the Loader will work.

➤HavensGate technology has been implemented, which allows to avoid runtime detection in practice and increase the success rate.

➤Own log market. Each client can monetize logs, put them up for sale in team’s market. The logs obtained using stealer are highly recognized.

➤From the professional subscription, collection of GoogleAccount session tokens is available. After logout, you can restore new cookies to Gmail and other Google services directly in our panel.

➤It is easy to master.Even users with low technical skills can easily master it.

➤Service. MaaS, everything is on secure and powerful servers. The client only needs a subscription. If the client wishes, we install the server lining ourselves. Support is available 24/7.

The team always ready to help and advise the client. Team provides the best service on the market.

Impersonate domain

EIP-7702 has been added, allowing drainer to withdraw up to 10 assets in a single approval, regardless of whether approval has been given to other aggregators like permit2.

Batch asset withdrawal is available on three networks:

- BSC

- Gnosis

All needed is an updated wallet that supports EIP-7702, such as MetaMask.

CEX

➤Buying crypto with Visa/MasterCard/ApplePay.

➤9 ways to buy cryptocurrency from cards. 3 inside the exchange, 6 external.

➤Multifunctional Warker Panel.

➤40+ editable coins for deposit.

➤Automatic, fast deposit verification.

➤Introduced the ability to set fixed amounts for verificationdeposits in a specific currency.

➤Added transaction fees (deposit as a percentage, withdrawal as a flat fee).

➤WalletConnect via seed phrase linking.

➤Fake P2P platform, fully working trading.

➤Now users can leave notes in the dashboard, helping you stay organized and avoid confusion

➤In the user support chat, links from the user's side are now clickable.

➤2 fake withdrawal options and commission customization.

➤Trust advanced KYC.

➤Convenient technical support for both the broker and the user.

➤Customization of bonus at registration/deposit.

➤PUMP/DUMP rate adjustment.

➤Fine-tuning of promo codes.

AML

➤Team transfers a small amount to the lead's wallet to cover the transaction fee, building trust.

➤The lead signs an approval for an asset (e.g., USDT or another), believing they are completing a routine verification process (while actually granting approval for the asset that will later be deposited in the wallet).

➤The obtained approval allows us to withdraw assets from the wallet as soon as they are deposited.

➤Multichain: Full support for working across various blockchains.

➤Custom PDF Reports: Elevate user trust to the next level.

➤Optimized logic: Achieve unparalleled conversion rates.

➤Meticulously crafted logic: By professionals for professionals.

After you purchase, we will give you a code as proof.
